name: property managers handling 10-20 lease renewals/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 lease renewals/month, manual tracking causes missed deadlines. We automate tracking and filing instead of manual tracking and filing of lease renewals.
features: simple dashboard for tracking lease statuses
manual entry option for unique cases
